We'll then call review_plan.

We have approval. Now run the commands.

Then read the unit files? We need to check if kdump.socket exists; if so, mask it.

We'll read /etc/systemd/system/kdump.socket maybe? Actually, unit files are in /etc/systemd/system/ for .socket units? Typically, socket units are in /etc/systemd/system/.

Let's read the file: read_file path="/etc/systemd/system/kdump.socket"

If content indicates it exists (non-empty), then we will run run_cmd command="systemctl mask kdump.socket"

Else do nothing.
